examples: The Beatles were the archetypal pop group.
The archetypal extrovert prefers action to contemplation, risk-taking to heed-taking, certainty to doubt.
The lawn is the archetypal enemy.
The HOW Report found that all companies fit into one of three archetypal categories.
But while co-founder Steve Wozniak was an archetypal engineer--a veteran of Hewlett-Packard--Jobs was something new.
